institution.name: The Maharaja Sayajirao University of Baroda (MSU)

degrees.description: Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science & Engineering from The Maharaja Sayajirao University of Baroda (Sep 2022 – May 2025). Worked on production-grade software products throughout the degree — built ResumeeAI as a final year project during 7th and 8th semester, receiving Best Project recognition from the university. Founded and led Code Vimarsh, a student-led technical community, as Vice President during the final years.

projects.name: ResumeeAI
projects.description: AI-based resume builder built as a final year project during 7th and 8th semester at Keshav Encon. Designed system architecture, database schema, RESTful APIs, OAuth 2.0 authentication, and integrated Gemini AI and locally fine-tuned Mistral-7B LLM.
projects.outcome: Received Best Project recognition from The Maharaja Sayajirao University of Baroda.

achievements: Best Project Award — ResumeeAI recognized as Best Final Year Project by The Maharaja Sayajirao University of Baroda
Founded and led Code Vimarsh — a student-led technical community at MSU with 300–400 students at inauguration
Built an alumni guidance network at Code Vimarsh with professionals from Google, Microsoft, and cybersecurity domains

images.alt: The Maharaja Sayajirao University of Baroda
images.label: MSU Degree

degrees.description: Diploma in Computer Science from Gujarat Technological University (Jan 2019 – Jun 2022). Graduated as Institute Topper with 9.67 CGPA, achieving 10 SPI in both 5th and 6th semester. Built a strong foundation in programming, databases, computer networks, and core engineering subjects. Won the Inter-College Web Development competition during the diploma.
achievements: Institute Topper — 1st rank at GTU Diploma
Academic Ranking in GTU Diploma Examination

certifications.name: Inter College Web Development Winner
certifications.description: Biggest challenge was we had to code in notepad and we were not allowed to access internet. It was an amazing experience. I got to learn how to build a project in a certain time constraint environment.

testScores.description: 10 SPI in 6th semester of Diploma in Computer Engineering.
10 SPI in 5th semester of Diploma Engineering.

documents.label: Secured 1st rank in SPI, 32nd rank in CGPA, and 38th rank in CPI in the GTU Diploma examination, reflecting consistent academic excellence and strong overall performance.

degrees.description: Primary and secondary schooling from LKG to 10th at Baroda High School, Alkapuri (2007 – 2019). Highly involved in NCC activities under the Indian Navy wing, representing Gujarat Directorate at the Republic Day Camp (RDC) in Delhi 2018 and marching at the Prime Minister Rally. Maintained strong academics alongside national-level extracurricular commitments.
achievements: NCC (National Cadet Corps) — Indian Navy wing, 2 Gujarat Naval Unit
Selected to represent Gujarat Directorate at RDC (Republic Day Camp) Delhi 2018 after 6 months of training
Marched at PM (Prime Minister) Rally, Cariappa Parade Ground, Delhi 2018
Met Admiral Sunil Lanba, 23rd Chief of the Naval Staff of the Indian Navy
Head of Computer Department, BHS Alkapuri Higher Secondary Section

certifications.name: NCC ex-cadet | RDC (Republic Day Camp) Delhi 2018 | PM (Prime Minister) Rally Delhi
certifications.issuer: NCC (National Cadet Corps) Ministry of Defence India
certifications.description: Selected to represent Gujarat Directorate of NCC from 2 Gujarat Naval Unit NCC after 6 months of rigorous training. Stayed with Indian Officers at Delhi, met Admiral Sunil Lanba (23rd Chief of the Naval Staff of the Indian Navy), and marched on Cariappa Parade Ground at the Prime Minister Rally 2018. Got a chance to meet the Prime Minister of India.
